channel.title: NAT Havermans, J Houben, F Vermeulen, M Boon, M Proesmans, N Lorent, E de Soir, R Vos, L Dupont | PlatCOVID

image.title: NAT Havermans, J Houben, F Vermeulen, M Boon, M Proesmans, N Lorent, E de Soir, R Vos, L Dupont

item.title: The impact of the COVID-19 pandemic on the emotional well-being and home treatment of Belgian patients with cystic fibrosis, including transplanted patients and paediatric patients.
